name: The White House
subject: Determined to Rebuild Texas and Louisiana
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6b1aa4d768889ee320609e9fa3469b5dbee4a67c06e7d4529afea9b2bc13aade00516b77f2c42bf2fd731233cd05e87867d89fed4775ecac

-------------

The President and First Lady in Texas

On Saturday, the President and the First Lady returned to Texas to visit with people effected by the damage resulting from Hurricane Harvey. The President and First Lady traveled to the NRG Center in Houston to meet and speak with displaced families staying in the shelter due to the flooding and assisted the Red Cross in serving lunch to the people living inside the shelter. The President and First Lady then traveled to a distribution center to thank volunteers and pass out supplies to local families who are in the beginning stages of what will be a long road to rebuilding or recovering their homes.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6b1aa4d768889ee3036f7557031cf6450e2bd58a0f0d83abf971503061923131857be95afe3d1f44c0acf176d1ebb0a8cc80bf93b13f455c
Watch the video

The President and First Lady in Louisiana

On Saturday, the President and the First Lady traveled to Louisiana to meet with local officials, the National Guard, and the Cajun Navy to receive a briefing on the neighboring state's relief efforts.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6b1aa4d768889ee390d74cb74f5785b6ff1437752eb89f7ea79293ce49fc97291cc32472ca231b1c07ee872b54325ef683e7c6be32b3eb29
Watch the video

Statement from the Office of the First Lady

"Our thoughts and prayers continue to be with the people and families so deeply effected by Harvey. After spending the day with children, women and men who have been impacted by the storm, it has only furthered our determination to provide all of the support we can as we pledge to continue our efforts in the long road ahead in the months to come." - First Lady Melania Trump

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6b1aa4d768889ee38b39ad147b7243ccd66e7bf96476cc58b113050b1ea5cd9de5376f90ba01260b47951d924ccf1273fa885df6d29143cb
Read more

President Trump Restores Responsibility and the Rule of Law to Immigration

Today, the Trump Administration rescinded the previous Administration’s memorandum that created the unlawful Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) program and has taken steps to end the program responsibly.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6b1aa4d768889ee3a48f8914da5fc593248cad017162395608ae6aeed9ec7563f8855ef91edbc5031b25920fd1a257f09f9f304307caa31b
Read President Trump's statement

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump at the NRG Stadium in Houston, Texas| September 2, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks)

POTUS and VP Today

Today, the President will meet with the National Economic Council, followed by a meeting with key members of Congress and his Administration regarding tax reform. In the evening, the President will speak to Prime Minister Malcolm Turnbull of Australia by telephone.

This afternoon, Vice President Pence will participate in a swearing-in ceremony for U.S. Surgeon General Dr. Jerome Adams.

Coming Up This Week

Tomorrow, President Trump will travel to North Dakota for a Tax Reform event. On Thursday, the Amir of Kuwait will visit the White House and meet with the President.

White House Spring Internship

The application for the Spring 2018 White House Internship Program is open!
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6b1aa4d768889ee3b5db4378c604eba5ea85a71055eb533bd48856e95cd239de94418e6863c737c77ab24498ace1b32db242b08f09129a28
Apply here

Privacy Policy |

name: Tom Perez
subject: BREAKING: Trump's DACA decision
body:
We need to hold the GOP accountable for this.
---
**Stand with immigrants -- pitch in $3 or more to help Democrats fight back against Trump's dangerous agenda.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523691/4067b0a/3f7370d16/7e6e837a/3012204642/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170905_tp_nd&source=em_20170905_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170905_tp_nd")**

Derek --

My parents were born in the Dominican Republic and met in the United States. My dad earned his citizenship through military service and became a doctor in Atlanta before moving to Buffalo. My mom came here with her family to escape the iron fist of a brutal dictator and pursue a better life in America.

They fell in love, got married, had my four older siblings and me, and worked their tails off to give us a shot at the American dream.

**[There are nearly 800,000 young people who were brought to this country so they could have the same chance at success that my parents wanted for my siblings and me. Today, Donald Trump took that dream away from them. As Democrats, we must rise and organize.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523691/4067b0a/3f7370d16/7e6e837b/3012204642/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+There+are+nearly+800000+young+people+who&utm_campaign=em_20170905_tp_nd&source=em_20170905_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170905_tp_nd")**

DREAMers have been raised and educated alongside our children. They contribute to our communities and our economy. They pledge allegiance to our flag and believe in our values -- and America is the only country they call home.

Donald Trump's heartless decision to rescind DACA will force these young people into the shadows. It is a moral disgrace.

We need to fix our immigration system, but we can do it without uprooting lives or shattering families. Democrats will fight to keep our country off this inhumane path that violates our most important founding principles. And I know we can win -- with your help.

Today, show Donald Trump we will not let his cruelty stand. Chip in $3 or more right now.

name: DWS
subject: URGENT: 750,000 reasons to act
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Friend,

President Barack Obama implemented the Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) program to protect law-abiding members of our communities who sought a better life. These individuals were brought to our country and have only known America as the country they love.

They live here, work here, contribute to our communities, and many have started families here. They fulfill jobs that are crucial to our communities in fields from health care, to computer science, to emergency services.

Before DACA, millions were living in the shadows, afraid of being deported to a country that they've never known. DACA brought them into the light and America has benefitted as a result. Our country is stronger and our economy is growing thanks to their efforts.

**All of that might end TODAY.** Republican Attorneys General have given President Trump until September 5th to overturn DACA or else they will sue his administration.

If that happens, more than 750,000 hardworking, law-abiding Americans will face deportation to a country they don't know. Families will be ripped apart. Our country will lose some of our most brilliant minds. Local communities will go without doctors, nurses, engineers, and so much more.

[_**We can 't allow that to happen. Please, sign your name and demand President Trump protect DACA.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e35/622b7b5b/5d9de6c/307bd9ff/2317190093/VEsH/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/defendDACA/?code=WassermanSchultz&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdwse170817%3Frefcode%3Ddwse1707817_m%26recurring%3Dtrue%26amount%3D5")

We can and must do better for our DREAMers. Take action before it's too late.

Thank you,

Debbie |

name: Team Kaine Rapid Response
subject: BREAKING: Tell President Trump that DREAMers are here to stay
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
| **BREAKING: Trump Will End DACA Program

This is a betrayal to young DREAMers who are strengthening Virginia and America. Tell him DREAMers are here to stay:**

**[DEFEND DACA](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=MiK1wJPhf5CAgh50Q5fv84AenNl0WGzx)**
---
Just last week, Tim Kaine met with a group of DREAMers in Alexandria to hear how DACA, or the "Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals" program, has helped them pursue their dreams. America has always been a nation of immigrants -- these DREAMers have made Virginia stronger and our economy more successful.

But now, President Trump is going back on his word and putting hundreds of thousands of young Americans, including more than 12,000 in Virginia, at risk of separation from their families by ending the DACA program as we know it.

This is a heartless decision that betrays these incredible young DREAMers who Trump said he would treat with "great heart."

**[These incredible kids came out of the shadows believing in the promise of America. This nation is their home. Tell President Trump not to send them back.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=iFOLw8xYC6SRSm1851E0U4AenNl0WGzx)**

Thank you for defending DACA.

\- Team Kaine Rapid Response | | Paid for by Kaine for Virginia

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Let’s show up for Manka
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Manka (D), P
body:
State government has never been more important -- and it's up to us to make sure we have a great one.

| [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTE4MTU3MzYS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTI0MDM5MjU4NgS2&mt=1&rt=0) Friend, I cannot tell you enough just how important it is that our state government is committed to fighting for what is right in these times. With President Trump and the federal government trying their best to take away environmental protections, our promise to accept refugees, and our access to health care and other services that Washingtonians rely on, we have to depend on our state government. And that's why we need someone like Manka Dhingra in office. Manka is the Democrat running for the 45th LD, and she needs your help. I know you're as committed as I am to making sure that our government keeps Washington the forward-looking state that we are. And that's why I'm asking for you to sign up to put your commitment into action -- and volunteer for Manka. [**Will you sign up to volunteer with state Senate candidate -- and my friend -- Manka Dhingra before her election?**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTE4MTU3MzYS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTI0MDM5MjU4NgS2&mt=1&rt=0) [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTE4MTU3MzYS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTI0MDM5MjU4NgS2&mt=1&rt=0) I know that I'll be out there supporting Manka, and I hope you will, too. Manka is one of the hardest-working, most caring, and deeply focused people I've met in politics. I am positive that she is the right choice to combat state Republicans' efforts to obstruct our values. And I am positive that she will do everything it takes to keep Washington moving forward no matter what. [**Please, do your part for Washington and sign up to volunteer for Manka!**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTE4MTU3MzYS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTI0MDM5MjU4NgS2&mt=1&rt=0) Thank you. And that's why we need someone like Manka Dhingra in office. Manka is the Democrat running for the 45th LD, and she needs your help. I know you're as committed as I am to making sure that our government keeps Washington the forward-looking state that we are. And that's why I'm asking for you to sign up to put your commitment into action -- and volunteer for Manka. I know that I'll be out there supporting Manka, and I hope you will, too. Manka is one of the hardest-working, most caring, and deeply focused people I've met in politics. I am positive that she is the right choice to combat state Republicans' efforts to obstruct our values. And I am positive that she will do everything it takes to keep Washington moving forward no matter what. Thank you. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee |

name: Erika Andiola, Our Revolution
subject: #DefendDACA
body:
Donald Trump just sent Jeff Sessions in front of reporters to announce an end to DACA
#
Friends,
Donald Trump just sent Jeff Sessions in front of reporters to announce an end to DACA. He didn't even have the courage to tell us himself.
The decision to throw 800,000 young people who came to the U.S. as children into legal jeopardy is despicable and immoral. Our Revolution believes that no human being is illegal. We need a path to citizenship not only for DREAMers, but all 11 million undocumented people living in the shadows today. When we bring people together and build stronger communities, everyone benefits.
**[It's up to Congress to act and protect the DREAMers who came out of the shadows in the good faith of a government now threatening to betray them. Please call your member of Congress and tell them to pass protections for DACA recipients NOW.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7afa4/bed43eb/620a2be/75ffaa1f/2286709744/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/defend-daca/?source=em170905")**
There is a bipartisan consensus that DACA should be protected. It includes the most conservative and most progressive members of Congress. **That's why your action is so important.**
**[Call your member of Congress to protect DACA recipients, and all those who are vulnerable, from deportation.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7afa4/bed43eb/620a2be/75ffaa1f/2286709744/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/defend-daca/?source=em170905")**
In solidarity,
Erika Andiola
Political Director
Our Revolution
DACA Recipient

name: Tom Perez
subject: re: DACA and what's next
body:
We need to hold the GOP accountable for this.
---
**Stand with immigrants -- pitch in $3 or more to help Democrats fight back against Trump's dangerous agenda.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405236ad/4067b0a/3f5f7d693/7e6e8880/108409275/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170905_tp2_nd&source=em_20170905_tp2_nd&refcode=em_20170905_tp2_nd")**

Derek --

Donald Trump just rescinded DACA. Nearly 800,000 DREAMers now face the possibility of being torn from their families and thrown out of the only country they have ever called home.

This decision is morally repugnant. It is rooted in prejudice and goes against our most fundamental values.

If America is a "shining city on a hill," then Donald Trump keeps trying to snuff out the light.

As Trump tries to trample on the American Dream, Democrats will continue to fight for the immigrant families who contribute to our country every day. That's the American way. If you're with us, pitch in $3 or whatever you can right now.

name: RAPID RESPONSE (via FlaDems.com)
subject: re: DACA and DREAMers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
**BREAKING: Trump ends DACA and puts nearly 800,000 DREAMers at risk
[TELL CONGRESS: Make DACA law now and protect DREAMers!](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bdc4/1a5213b3/7039e072/718b7deb/309049545/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIn0=/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/s/stand-up-for-dreamers-?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+TELL+CONGRESS+Make+DACA+law+now+and+prot&utm_campaign=em090517&source=em090517&refcode=em090517")** Friend, we're FURIOUS.

Donald Trump and Jeff Sessions just announced they're ending DACA (Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals), a key program for protecting young people who immigrated to the U.S. as children.

These young Americans came here under no choice of their own and have only known life as Americans.

That is why Trump's decision to undo the protections DACA provides these 800,000 young Americans is so disgusting.

[**Trump doesn 't want to be held accountable for his decision.**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bdc4/1a5213b3/7039e072/718b7dea/309049545/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIn0=/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/s/stand-up-for-dreamers-?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+Trump+doesnrsquot+want+to+be+held+accoun&utm_campaign=em090517&source=em090517&refcode=em090517") That is why he is trying to put the blame on Congressional Republicans. Listen, we have to stand up for these young Americans.

[**Click here to add your name if you want Washington to ensure DREAMers are protected and can continue living their lives right here in America.**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bdc4/1a5213b3/7039e072/718b7de5/309049545/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIn0=/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/s/stand-up-for-dreamers-?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+Click+here+to+add+your+name+if+you+want+&utm_campaign=em090517&source=em090517&refcode=em090517")

DREAMers are teachers, nurses, and small-business owners helping make our country better. _In Florida alone, they contribute over $1.5 billion to our economy._

But now, Trump wants to forcibly deport DREAMers from the only country they've ever known.

**[_We MUST stand up to fight for DREAMers._](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bdc4/1a5213b3/7039e072/718b7de4/309049545/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIn0=/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/s/stand-up-for-dreamers-?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=4+-+We+MUST+stand+up+to+fight+for+DREAMers&utm_campaign=em090517&source=em090517&refcode=em090517")**

It's CRITICAL we put pressure on Congress to make DACA law and save DREAMers. That's why we need you to sign our petition NOW.

[**SIGN ON NOW >>**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bdc4/1a5213b3/7039e072/718b7de7/309049545/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIn0=/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/s/stand-up-for-dreamers-?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=5+-+SIGN+ON+NOW+gtgt&utm_campaign=em090517&source=em090517&refcode=em090517")

Thanks,

subject: [Senate] The 2 most vulnerable Republicans >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c67dd/24c69fd9/a3733b64/189b0575/837768479/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE906N_digital_email_20170905_HellerFlake_inact&source=WQEFE906N_digital_email_20170905_HellerFlake_inact")
---

Peter,

Dean Heller and Jeff Flake are in trouble.

How do I know? Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell held a fundraiser for them because they are two of the most **vulnerable** Republican senators up for re-election next year.

McConnell may be working hard, but so are we. And if we all do our part, it won't matter how many fundraisers he holds.

**[Donate $3 to help defeat Heller and Flake and replace them with pro-choice Democratic women next year.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c67dd/24c69fd9/a3733b64/189b0576/837768479/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170905_email_HellerFlake?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+defeat+Heller+and+Flake&utm_campaign=WQEFE906N_digital_email_20170905_HellerFlake_inact&source=WQEFE906N_digital_email_20170905_HellerFlake_inact")**

By making Heller and Flake part of our largest-ever Republican opposition program, we're making it clear that we know they're vulnerable AND that we're coming for their seats.

And with their long anti-choice records and repeated votes to strip health care away from millions of Americans, they're due for replacement.

We already helped get Jacky Rosen's campaign to replace Heller off to a strong start this spring. If we can keep recruiting and supporting strong candidates, these red seats (and others like them!) will absolutely turn blue next year.

**Donate $3 to support our candidates and defeat Dean Heller, Jeff Flake, and dozens of other Republicans next year:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Defeat-Heller-Flake](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c67dd/24c69fd9/a3733b64/189b0577/837768479/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170905_email_HellerFlake?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgDefeatHellerFlak&utm_campaign=WQEFE906N_digital_email_20170905_HellerFlake_inact&source=WQEFE906N_digital_email_20170905_HellerFlake_inact")**

Thanks,

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c67dd/24c69fd9/a3733b64/189b0570/837768479/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170905_email_HellerFlake?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFE906N_digital_email_20170905_HellerFlake_inact&source=WQEFE906N_digital_email_20170905_HellerFlake_inact")
